description: 60-V, 6-A eFuse with adjustable output power limiting

1.name: IN
1.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.

2.name: IN
2.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.

5.name: P_IN
5.description: Supply voltage of the device. Always connect P_IN to IN directly.

6.name: UVLO
6.description: Input for setting the programmable undervoltage lockout threshold.

7.name: OVP
7.description: Input for setting the adjustable overvoltage protection threshold (TPS16630 only). (also: PLIM — Input for setting the adjustable output power limiting threshold (TPS16632 only).)

9.name: dVdT
9.description: A capacitor from this pin to GND sets output voltage slew rate. Leaving this pin floating enables device power up in thermal regulation.

10.name: ILIM
10.description: A resistor from this pin to GND sets the overload limit.

11.name: MODE
11.description: Mode selection pin for Overload fault response.

12.name: SHDN
12.description: Shutdown pin. Pulling SHDN low makes the device to enter into low power shutdown mode.

13.name: IMON
13.description: Analog current monitor output. Sources a scaled down ratio of current through the internal FET.

14.name: FLT
14.description: Fault event indicator. This pin is an open drain output.

16.name: PGOOD
16.description: Active High. A high indicates that the internal FET is enhanced.

EP.name: PowerPAD
EP.description: Connect PowerPAD to GND plane for heat sinking. Do not use PowerPAD as the only electrical connection to GND.
